session.user: Run `ty check src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_api.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/ref_resolution.py` and report results. DO NOT modify any files.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ty check src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_api.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot_dispatch.py src/erk/cli/commands/ref_resolution.py
